name: One Life Transportation LLC
districts_or_customers: Southern California medical/paratransit clients (no school district contracts identified)
recent_news: Established 2022 as woman-owned, minority-owned SDVOSB providing non-emergency medical transport across Southern California.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator. NEMT/gurney/paratransit only, founded 2022 with 3 employees. Not a Summit tuck-in fit.

name: Wren Mobility Transport LLC
districts_or_customers: Baytown/greater Houston area medical transport clients; no school district contracts identified
recent_news: Operates as small NEMT provider in Baytown, TX; appears on local medical transportation directories. No recent M&A activity identified.
fit_notes: Appears to be a small NEMT/medical transport LLC, not a yellow-bus school operator. Not a Summit tuck-in fit.

name: Lets Go 2 Transportation
districts_or_customers: Canton, OH area; no school district contracts identified
recent_news: Sole-proprietor style operation registered at owner Randy King's residence (3942 Paradise St SW, Canton, OH per Stark County records). No M&A or news identified. Note: separate company 'Let's Go' (ridewithletsgo.com) is an Atlanta GA operator dating to 1995 and is NOT the same entity.
fit_notes: Very small home-based operation (~4 employees, est. ~$679K revenue) with no confirmed school district contracts. Not a meaningful Summit tuck-in target.

name: Cascade Cabulance
districts_or_customers: Greater Bellevue/Seattle area NEMT; no school district contracts identified
recent_news: Yelp lists business as CLOSED (updated July 2025). Founded 1/8/1997, operated 29 years as wheelchair/NEMT taxi service in Bellevue, WA before apparent closure.
fit_notes: Appears defunct/closed and was a NEMT/cabulance taxi rather than a school-bus operator. Not a Summit tuck-in fit.

name: All City Transport LLC
districts_or_customers: Madison, TN (Nashville metro) area; no school district contracts identified
recent_news: Small LLC operating at 223 Madison St, Madison TN. Note: FMCSA USDOT #3711588 with the same name returns a separate California carrier in San Bernardino with 0 power units, indicating that record is NOT the TN entity. No M&A activity identified.
fit_notes: Very small operation (~9 employees, est. ~$638K revenue) with no confirmed school district contracts or yellow-bus operations. Not a Summit tuck-in fit.
